steps.title: Connect the motto to the habit
steps.content: The text says Montaigne repeatedly questioned his own perspective. His motto, "What do I know?", expresses that same self-questioning attitude, so the transition should show that the motto naturally fits the description.

steps.title: Reject contrast and time shifts
steps.content: A signals concession, but the motto does not persist despite an obstacle. B signals an opposite relationship, while the motto reinforces the prior point. D signals a present-day time shift that the sentence does not make. The answer is C.
